svg.title: PortPulse Full Stack Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the frontend, backend, database, and external APIs of the PortPulse application

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who is the user in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does the search bar component do in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does the results dashboard show in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does the Express route layer do in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the port scanner work in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the DNS resolver work in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the SSL checker work in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does subdomain enumeration work in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the IP info module work in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk engine calculate the security score in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does MongoDB store in PortPulse?')
sendPrompt('What external APIs does PortPulse use?')
sendPrompt('What is the scan target in PortPulse?')

svg.text: Docker Compose — frontend + backend + MongoDB | Deploy: Fly.io / Oracle Cloud Free
